TV Series.title: Holmes on Homes: Building a Legacy
TV Series.overview: Mike Holmes, along with his children Michael and Sherry, helps deserving homeowners fix disastrous renovations and build healthier, functional homes.

TV Series.title: Somewhat Familiar
TV Series.overview: Pedro Andrade travels the world uncovering how different cultures experience fatherhood and family diversity.

TV Series.title: Greatest Mysteries Ever
TV Series.overview: From ancient tombs and the fall of nations to biblical legends and unexplained phenomena, uncover the truth behind history's greatest mysteries.

TV Series.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
TV Series.overview: Now single, 90 Day Fiance favorites are looking to find love again while attempting to let go of baggage from their past.

TV Series.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
TV Series.overview: Over five intense days, 120 Hours Behind Bars delivers an unfiltered look inside America's toughest jails -- where officers are outnumbered, cellblocks are overcrowded, and violence erupts without warning.

TV Series.title: Banksters
TV Series.overview: When 20-something Yusuf is arrested for a series of bank heists, his sister attempts to return the money and identify who betrayed him.

TV Series.title: Asia
TV Series.overview: Sir David Attenborough presents Asia, a seven-part series covering the length and breadth of our planet's largest and richest continent, revealing its most remarkable landscapes and animals, and stories featuring dramatic, previously unseen behavior.

TV Series.title: A Knight in the Making
TV Series.overview: Follow A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms from the page to the screen in this fascinating and comprehensive look at how HBO's newest series in the Game of Thrones universe was brought to life. Visit the impressive sets, see auditions with the stars, and explore the process behind costumes, weapons, choreography, and more as both cast and crew open up on how the magic happens.

TV Series.title: Surviving the Jehovah's Witnesses
TV Series.overview: Known for their door-to-door proselytizing and strict rules around celebrations and medical treatment, the Jehovah's Witnesses are an international Christian denomination that preaches a message of renewed hope in the afterlife. But behind their friendly and idyllic image are lesser-known aspects of the faith that have remained hidden for decades. In this three-part docuseries from Spain, former members speak out about their experiences, including abuse, homophobia, and sexism -- as well as the events that led to them being shunned by the community. Alongside the testimony of a devout elder, Surviving the Jehovah's Witnesses is an in-depth look at the lives of those impacted by the group, and what the future holds for those who have left.

TV Series.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
TV Series.overview: Texas Ranger James Holland doesn’t play by the rules. He’s known as a serial killer whisperer because of his unique brand of interrogation tactics in cases once considered unsolvable. Watch as killers reveal the disturbing truth behind their crimes.

TV Series.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
TV Series.overview: Jesse Palmer hosts as 16 of America's most elite pastry chefs are pushed to their limits in high-stakes pastry challenges. Each week, the competitors will be tested on the core techniques that every top pastry chef must master, including laminated doughs and pâte à choux, chocolate work, sugar artistry, intricate cakes, and precision-plated desserts. The chefs must innovate and execute at the highest level to determine who has the skill, vision, and endurance to rise above the rest in a celebration of pastry and baking artistry. In the end, only one competitor will win $50,000 and the title of Ultimate Baking Champion.

TV Series.title: Portobello
TV Series.overview: In the early 1980s, Enzo Tortora (Fabrizio Gifuni) is one of the most beloved figures on Italian television: respected, trusted, and watched by millions each week on his long-running variety series "Portobello." But in the midst of Italy's war against organized crime, Enzo's life is upended when he's falsely connected to the notorious Camorra criminal ring. After his arrest, Enzo's case triggers a legal and media firestorm that shatters public trust, redefines his legacy, and forces him to clear his name from behind bars. From acclaimed writer/director Marco Bellocchio, Portobello tells the true story of a national icon brought down by the very system meant to protect him -- in one of the most infamous miscarriages of justice in Italian history.

TV Series.title: 1000-lb Best Friends
TV Series.overview: Larger-than-life roommates Nesha and Jaz tackle life, love and losing weight as they bond over food and their shared love of Jaz's daughter, Nana.

TV Series.title: Neighborhood Watch
TV Series.overview: Take a front-row seat to the wild and unexpected events that unfold as home cameras record hilarious, shocking, and downright bizarre moments.

TV Series.title: Neighbors
TV Series.overview: This explosive series explores the chaotic and complicated disputes of neighbours...and the extreme lengths they'll go to defend what's theirs.

TV Series.title: Rooster
TV Series.overview: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

TV Series.title: DTF St. Louis
TV Series.overview: When weatherman Clark Forrest (Emmy® winner Jason Bateman) and his new on-air ASL interpreter Floyd Smernitch (Emmy® nominee David Harbour) strike up a friendship in the sleepy St. Louis suburb of Twyla, Missouri, they quickly discover that both of their marriages have stalled. After turning to a new app for extramarital affairs, their unlikely friendship is put to test when a love triangle forms...and one of them ends up dead. A comedic, twisted mystery from creator Steven Conrad, DTF St. Louis mines middle-aged malaise, long-held insecurities, and the bonds of friendship – as a pair of formidable investigators dig deeper to unravel the case.

Movies.title: The Cranes Are Flying
Movies.overview: This landmark film by the virtuosic Mikhail Kalatozov was heralded as a revelation in the post-Stalin Soviet Union and the international cinema community alike. It tells the story of Veronica (Tatiana Samoilova) and Boris (Alexei Batalov), a couple who are blissfully in love until World War II tears them apart. With Boris at the front, Veronica must try to ward off spiritual numbness and defend herself from the increasingly forceful advances of her beau’s draft-dodging cousin. Winner of the Palme d’Or at the 1958 Cannes Film Festival, THE CRANES ARE FLYING is a superbly crafted drama with impassioned performances and viscerally emotional, gravity-defying cinematography by Kalatozov’s regular collaborator Sergei Urusevsky.

Movies.title: That Certain Woman
Movies.overview: When Mary Connell - the innocent young wife of a notorious gangster - suddenly becomes a young widow, she tries to improve herself but finds her past difficult to escape.

Movies.title: Arrow In The Dust
Movies.overview: A deserter takes on his dead captain's identity to save a wagon train.

Movies.title: Call Me by Your Name
Movies.overview: Set in the early 1980s, a 17-year-old boy falls in love with a young doctoral student staying with his parents over the summer in the Italian Riviera.

Movies.title: A Stolen Life
Movies.overview: A twin takes her deceased sister's place as the wife of the man they both love.

Movies.title: Paddington 2
Movies.overview: Paddington must use his detective skills to catch a book thief in this fun-filled sequel.

Movies.title: Mr. Skeffington
Movies.overview: A flighty beauty marries a stockbroker for convenience and almost ruins both their lives.

Movies.title: The Fighting 69th
Movies.overview: A braggart soldier learns the true meaning of heroism when he joins World War I's all-Irish unit.

Movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
Movies.overview: When New York is put under siege by the mysterious company Oscorp, it is up to Spider-Man to save the city he swore to protect, as well as his loved ones.

Movies.title: Kid Galahad
Movies.overview: When a bellhop knocks out fighter Chuck McGraw, promoter Nick Donati realizes he's a potential champ.

Movies.title: Flamingo Road
Movies.overview: Academy Award winner Joan Crawford stars as a sideshow dancer whose passion and ambition tear apart a small Florida town that sits along Flamingo Road.

Movies.title: Memento
Movies.overview: His short-term memory gone, a man tattoos his body with clues on a mind-bending mission in reverse to piece together the puzzle of his wife’s murder.

Movies.title: The Woman on Pier 13
Movies.overview: Communists blackmail a San Francisco shipper (Robert Ryan) and recruit his wife's (Laraine Day) brother (John Agar) with a blonde.

Movies.title: Along the Great Divide
Movies.overview: For his first movie Western, Kirk Douglas rode in good company. Filmed in the rugged High Sierras and Mojave Desert, Along the Great Divide is a lean, bullet-hard sagebrush saga.

Movies.title: The Star
Movies.overview: Movie queen Margaret Elliot’s popularity and fortune have gone bad. But she’s sure she can jump-start her dimming career. “One good picture is all I need,” she says. As Margaret, Bette Davis got yet another good picture and earned her ninth Academy Award® nomination. Davis’ confident, perceptive performance lends absolute authenticity, as did a prop she provided. An Oscar® statuette – set noticeably on the car dashboard during Margaret’s drunken spin through Beverly Hills – was one of two Davis owned. Sterling Hayden and Natalie Wood costar in this gripping story that has “many moments of truth” (Leonard Maltin’s Movie Guide). The Star shines.

Movies.title: A Woman's Face
Movies.overview: Plastic surgery gives a scarred female criminal a new outlook on life.

Movies.title: When Ladies Meet
Movies.overview: A female novelist doesn't realize her new friend is the wife whose husband she's trying to steal.

Movies.title: In This Our Life
Movies.overview: Spoiled heiress Stanley Timerlake seduces and steals her sister's husband, driving him to alcoholism and suicide. Returning home, she kills a mother and daughter in a hit-and-run, then blames the crime on an innocent servant while feeling no remorse.

Movies.title: The Blair Witch Project
Movies.overview: Three film students enter the Maryland forest to film a documentary on the local Blair Witch legend, but are never heard from again. A year later their footage was found.

Movies.title: Susan and God
Movies.overview: Socialite Susan Trexel undergoes a religious transformation and takes on the task of spreading her newfound religion to her closest friends.

Movies.title: Robot Chicken: Self-Discovery Special
Movies.overview: Our hapless Robot Chicken Nerd seeks self-discovery America's way: Going on reality shows! Will he find a 90 Day Fiancé -- or end up Shark Week chum?

Movies.title: Badman's Country
Movies.overview: Lawman Pat Garrett is on the verge of retirement when a new challenge comes his way in the person of Butch Cassidy.

Movies.title: Blair Witch
Movies.overview: After discovering a video showing what he believes to be his vanished sister Heather, James and a group of friends head into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland, which many believe is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch.

Movies.title: The Old Maid
Movies.overview: An unmarried mother gives her illegitimate child to her cousin.

Movies.title: The Young Guns
Movies.overview: From a movie era that explored - in films like Rebel Without a Cause, Blackboard jungle and High School Confidential! - what the day‘s media called “juvenile deliquency".

Movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
Movies.overview: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains newfound, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

Movies.title: Dancing Lady
Movies.overview: Clark Gable, Joan Crawford, Franchot Tone, Fred Astaire and the Three Stooges star in this musical romantic comedy about two strong-willed men who will do anything to win the heart of a Dancing Lady. Down on her luck, Janie Barlow (Academy Award winner Crawford--The Women, Humoresque) resorts to dancing in a burlesque show where she is seen by--and instantly wins the heart of--slumming milliona...

Movies.title: Evan Almighty
Movies.overview: When God instructs him to build an ark, Evan's life goes from overnight success to almighty mess!

Movies.title: The Purchase Price
Movies.overview: This offbeat melodrama was directed by the iconoclastic William A. Wellman and stars Barbara Stanwyck as Joan Gordon, a hardboiled nightclub singer on the lam who becomes a farmer's mail-order bride. After Joan gets fed up being the kept woman of her married boss, bootlegger Ed Fields (Lyle Talbot), she flees New York City and ends up in North Dakota as the mail-order bride of wheat farmer Jim Gilson (George Brent). The film features one of the weirdest wedding ceremonies ever shot, and Stanwyck's rendition of "Take Me Away" marks the first time she sang on screen.

Movies.title: Special Agent
Movies.overview: A newspaperman working undercover for the Feds teams up with a pretty bookkeeper in over her head working for the mob.

Movies.title: The Pope's Exorcist
Movies.overview: Inspired by the actual files of Father Gabriele Amorth, Chief Exorcist of the Vatican (Academy Award®-winner Russell Crowe), The Pope's Exorcist follows Amorth as he investigates a young boy's terrifying possession and ends up uncovering a centuries-old conspiracy the Vatican has desperately tried to keep hidden.

Movies.title: Miss Pinkerton
Movies.overview: A private duty nurse gets herself mixed up in a murder investigation. Miss Adams has an unusual eye for detail, so when a police detective sends her undercover to solve a puzzling murder case, she unravels a complex plot, and risking her life.

Movies.title: Spider-Man 3
Movies.overview: The seemingly invincible Spider-Man (Tobey Maguire) goes up against an all-new crop of villains—including the shape-shifting Sandman. While his superpowers are altered by an alien organism, his alter ego, Peter Parker, deals with nemesis Eddie Brock.

Movies.title: Bride of Frankenstein
Movies.overview: Dr. Frankenstein creates a female mate for his monster.

Movies.title: The Final Destination
Movies.overview: Death returns to claim the survivors of a massive speedway tragedy in this fourth installment in the 'Final Destination' series.

Movies.title: Winter Meeting
Movies.overview: A repressed poetess and an embittered war hero help each other cope with their problems.

Movies.title: The Damned Don't Cry
Movies.overview: Ethel Whitehead leaves her laborer husband behind to find a new, better life, and meets a rich gangster that leads her to a life of wealth and luxury. She engineers a rivalry, however, that sparks the ruin of everything she has fought to gain.

Movies.title: Chris Fleming: Live at The Palace
Movies.overview: From the Cadillac Palace Theatre in Chicago, comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special.

Movies.title: Final Destination 5
Movies.overview: Death returns to claim the lucky survivors of a deadly bridge collapse in this fifth frightening installment in the series.

Movies.title: The Greatest Showman
Movies.overview: A bold and original musical celebrating the birth of show business and dreams coming to life.

Movies.title: Lola Versus
Movies.overview: A 29-year-old woman embarks on a funny and emotional journey after she is dumped by her fiance just weeks before her wedding.

Movies.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
Movies.overview: A plucky 10-year-old girl and her grandfather discover a mysterious reindeer near their family home over the holidays. Together, they work to protect the magical animal while trying to understand why he's visited them in this charming Christmas tale.

Movies.title: Angel's Egg
Movies.overview: In an underwater city, a young girl takes care of a large egg she holds carefully in her arms. A boy with a gun arrives in search of a bird he saw in his dream. At first, it seems as if feelings of sympathy are developing between the two. The film is a creative collaboration between acclaimed director Mamoru Oshii (Ghost in the Shell), who wrote and directed the feature, and revered artist Yoshitaka Amano (Final Fantasy, Vampire Hunter D). The film beautifully intertwines Oshii's thematic reflections on philosophy and theolog with Amano's distinctive ink painting style, culminating in an arrestingly beautiful hand-drawn allegorical fantasy.

Movies.title: Gentleman Jim
Movies.overview: When boxing is still little more than street brawling, Jim Corbett battles to make it a sport. He attains his dream in a fight against a heavyweight champion. After 21 grueling rounds, Corbett emerges victorious, proving the merit of "scientific" boxing.

Movies.title: Final Destination 3
Movies.overview: A teen has a premonition she and her friends will be involved in an accident. When the vision proves true, the student and survivors deal with the repercussions of cheating death.

Movies.title: Payment on Demand
Movies.overview: David (Barry Sullivan) gives his wife, Joyce (Bette Davis), an unexpected -- and unpleasant -- surprise when he suddenly demands a divorce. When she then learns that David has taken up with a younger woman, Joyce decides to make the most of this separation by taking a solo trip to the Caribbean. However, just before diving into a vacation fling, she runs into Emily (Jane Cowl), an old chum whose own divorce has left her embittered. Joyce then debates giving married life one last chance.

Movies.title: Ladies They Talk About
Movies.overview: A lady bank robber becomes the cell block boss after she's sent to prison.

Movies.title: Final Destination 2
Movies.overview: A college freshman has a premonition of a horrible car accident, which she thwarts. But Death will not be cheated, and those who escaped their fate struggle to stay alive.

Movies.title: Date Night
Movies.overview: A husband and wife in their thirties try to generate some sparks with a date night.

Movies.title: Judy
Movies.overview: This portrait of showbiz legend Judy Garland finds her facing turbulence in her personal life while performing a series of concerts in London in 1968.

Movies.title: Marked Woman
Movies.overview: Mary Dwight Stauber, a nightclub hostess who works for the notorious gangster Johnny Vanning, briefly meets and befriends a young man who confides in her that he does not have the money to repay the gambling debt he has accrued during the night. He feels that it's a game, but Mary warns him that he is in real danger.

Movies.title: A Lost Lady
Movies.overview: A bitter woman who thinks she'll never love again marries, only to fall for a brash young man.

Movies.title: 42nd Street
Movies.overview: Julian Marsh, a successful Broadway director, produces a new show in spite of his poor health. The money comes from a rich old man, who is in love with the star of the show, Dorothy Brock. But she doesn't return his love because she is still in love with her old partner. On the night before the premiere, Dorothy Brock breaks her ankle, and one of the chorus girls, Peggy Sawyer, tries to take over her part.

Movies.title: Juarez
Movies.overview: Tells the story of Benito Juárez and his fight against the French to bring democracy to Mexico and to rid the country of French occupation.

Movies.title: The Corn Is Green
Movies.overview: A schoolteacher faces resistance when she arrives in a Welsh mining town determined to educate the locals. A promising writer inspires her to persist.

Movies.title: Swiss Army Man
Movies.overview: Hank is stranded on a deserted island when a corpse washes ashore and the two go on an epic adventure to bring Hank back to the woman of his dreams.

Movies.title: All the President's Men
Movies.overview: Robert Redford and Dustin Hoffman are splendid as reporters Bob Woodward and Carl Bernstein, whose investigation into the 1972 Watergate break-in led to President Richard Nixon's resignation. Winner of four Oscars.

Movies.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
Movies.overview: Members of a tour group out to explore the Blair Witch legend fall prey to a malevolent force.

Movies.title: Sweet Bird of Youth
Movies.overview: Paul Newman stars as a ruthless gigolo visiting his hometown in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams's play.

Movies.title: Making of The Last of Us
Movies.overview: Featuring extensive interviews with the cast and crew, this all-access documentary gives a rare glimpse into the daunting behind-the-scenes efforts that went into the production of the HBO Original smash hit series The Last of Us.

Movies.title: Old Acquaintance
Movies.overview: Academy Award winner Bette Davis stars as the well-respected author Kitty Marlowe, who returns to her small town birthplace where her life becomes embroiled with a now-jealous Old Acquaintance. Despite Millie Drake's (Miriam Hopkins) life as a happy wife and mother, she becomes envious of Kitty's success -- and writes a trashy novel that is published with huge success. As Millie's fame soars an...

Movies.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
Movies.overview: Passion, obsession and horror combine to recreate the most terrifying and shattering story of all time - Mary Shelley's Frankenstein. It is the late eighteenth century. After the death of his beloved mother, young Victor Frankenstein leaves his father and Elizabeth, the adopted sister he passionately loves, to attend university. Here he is befriended by the cheerful Henry Clerval, and becomes o..

Movies.title: Dance, Fools, Dance
Movies.overview: A spoiled rich brother and sister are forced to earn a living and fall on opposite sides of the law. When Bonnie takes a job as a reporter, she discovers the gangland killing she is investigating involves her brother under the orders of a local mob boss.

Movies.title: The Secret Bride
Movies.overview: A district attorney secretly marries the daughter of a man he's trying to convict.

Movies.title: Little Miss Sunshine
Movies.overview: When a fluke gets an awkward 7-year-old invited to compete in a beauty pageant, her misfit family rallies behind her.

Movies.title: Sunshine Cleaning
Movies.overview: Once the high school cheerleading captain who dated the quarterback, Rose Lorkowski now finds herself a 30-something single mother working as a maid. Her sister Norah is still living at home with their dad Joe, a salesman with a lifelong history of ill-fated get rich quick schemes.

Movies.title: Vengeance Valley
Movies.overview: Two sons, one biological and the other adopted, of a Colorado cattle baron grow up and fight for control of their father's business empire.

Movies.title: Valley of the Sun
Movies.overview: Indian scout Johnny Ware (James Craig) is determined to stop an all-out war plotted by crooked Indian Affairs agent Jim Sawyer (Dean Jagger).

Movies.title: The Women
Movies.overview: Catty New York socialites gossip about a friend (Norma Shearer) and her husband's girlfriend (Joan Crawford).

Movies.title: Accidentally Brave
Movies.overview: With unexpected humor, Maddie Corman shares a story of perseverance and hope in the face of crisis in this film based on her renowned one-woman show.

Movies.title: The Burning Hills
Movies.overview: The gunmen who cut down Trace Jordan’s brother have closed ground on hard-riding Trace.

Movies.title: Final Destination
Movies.overview: Death comes for a group of teens who escaped their fate on a doomed airliner in this chiller.

Movies.title: Men
Movies.overview: Alone in a country house, a woman’s unease at the town’s leering and uncannily similar men grows into a primal, fully-fledged nightmare.

Movies.title: Jimmy the Gent
Movies.overview: Academy Award winners James Cagney and Bette Davis star as a less-than-scrupulous private detective and the woman he loves--who has just left him for an even less scrupulous employer. Jimmy Corrigan (Gagney) is jealous when his operative and sweatheart, Joan Martin (Davis), goes to work for Charles Wallingham (Alan Dinehart) because Wallingham seems to have much more class than Corrigan. But Co...

Movies.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
Movies.overview: An exhausted Chinese American woman becomes an unlikely hero while traversing the multiverse in this Best Picture®-winning sci-fi action adventure.

Movies.title: Parachute Jumper
Movies.overview: A gangster victimizes three friends trying to get jobs.

Movies.title: Satan Met a Lady
Movies.overview: Before Bogart and Huston created the most enduring film version of Dashiell Hammett's detective novel The Maltese Falcon, this Bette Davis rendition brought the thriller to the screen in a somewhat comedic style, telling the twisting tale of a detective who is caught between a lying seductress and a lady jewel thief. Detective Ted Shayne (Warren William) is hired by Valerie Purvis (Davis) to find a woman named Madame Barrabas (Alison Skipworth). But Valerie has a secret that endangers Ted's life, while a valuable jewel-encrusted ram's horn serves as the key to the whole affair.

Movies.title: The Terminator
Movies.overview: Arnold Schwarzenegger is unforgettable as an unstoppable cyborg who is sent back in time to kill a young woman in this sci-fi classic.

Movies.title: 'Til We Meet Again
Movies.overview: A dying woman shares a shipboard romance with a criminal on his way to the gallows.

Movies.title: Spring Breakers
Movies.overview: Four friends are arrested for stealing to fund their spring break trip, but find more trouble when a drug dealer bails them out to do some dirty work.

Movies.title: This Woman Is Dangerous
Movies.overview: The stylish leader of a gang of thieves enters a hospital for an eye operation and falls in love with her doctor.

Movies.title: Above Suspicion
Movies.overview: Two honeymooners encounter danger when they come to the aid of the British Secret Service.

Movies.title: 5 Centimeters per Second
Movies.overview: Takai forms a close bond with his classmate Akari. However, as the pair grow up and drift apart, Takai reflects on all that he left unsaid.

Movies.title: Happy Death Day
Movies.overview: After being brutally killed on the night of her birthday, college student Tree Gelbman finds herself reliving the day of her murder over and over...and over. As each day repeats, Tree must sift through all of the mundane details to identify her killer and put an end to the nightmare.

Movies.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
Movies.overview: At fortysomething, straight-laced Cal Weaver is living the dream--good job, nice house, great kids and marriage to his high school sweetheart. But when Cal learns that his wife, Emily, has cheated on him and wants a divorce, his perfect life quickly unravels. Worse, in today's single world, Cal, who hasn't dated in decades, stands out as the epitome of un-smooth. Now spending his free evenings ...

Movies.title: Spider-Man 2
Movies.overview: Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) is going through a major identity crisis. Burned out from being Spider-Man, he decides to shelve his superhero alter ego, which leaves the city suffering in the wake of carnage left by the evil Doctor Octopus.

Movies.title: V for Vendetta
Movies.overview: From Lilly and Lana Wachowski and Joel Silver, the masterminds behind The Matrix trilogy, comes another intriguing, action-packed fantasy-thriller.

Movies.title: Spider-Man
Movies.overview: Average teenager Peter Parker is transformed into an extraordinary superhero after he's bitten by a radioactive spider. Deeming himself "Spider-Man," he sets about ridding the streets of crime and faces the evil super-villain Green Goblin. (Drama Movies)

Movies.title: Dead of Winter
Movies.overview: Hit by a blizzard, a grief-stricken loner (Emma Thompson) gets lost among backroads near a Minnesotan lake and stops for help at a remote cabin in the woods. Here she discovers a young woman (Laurel Marsden) kidnapped by a desperate couple (Judy Greer, Marc Menchaca) who are armed and intent on murder. Isolated and without cell service, this unlikely hero realizes she is the woman's only hope of survival. Directed by Brian Kirk; written by Nicholas Jacobson-Larson and Dalton Leeb.

Movies.title: The 40 Year Old Virgin
Movies.overview: Andy is a nice guy who, at the age of 40, hasn’t had sex. His misguided coworkers try to help him score - and maybe even find true love - in this hilarious comedy.

Movies.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
Movies.overview: John Wick takes on his most lethal adversaries yet in the upcoming fourth installment of the series. With the price on his head ever increasing, Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Osaka to Berlin.

Movies.title: Fackham Hall
Movies.overview: Mistaken identities, forbidden love, and one very inconvenient corpse turn a grand English manor into total bedlam in this British comedy.
